restaurants.name: Sanctuary Cafe
restaurants.ambience: Convenient and on-site, nestled inside the Sanctuary grounds with a direct view of the temple's intricate architecture
source_files: Thailand/Arpita Thailand.pdf

restaurants.name: Naklua Kitchen
source_files: Thailand/Arpita Thailand.pdf

restaurants.name: Jasmin's Cafe
restaurants.ambience: A charming, cozy café with a laid-back, rustic vibe and only about 20 seats. It features hanging baskets and appealing artwork, with both indoor and outdoor dining. Its small size gives it an intimate atmosphere
source_files: Thailand/Arpita Thailand.pdf

restaurants.name: Tree Tales Café
restaurants.ambience: A serene café offering both air-conditioned indoor dining and a garden seating area. It delivers a tranquil, vintage-style ambience—perfect for relaxed meals or a quiet coffee
source_files: Thailand/Arpita Thailand.pdf

restaurants.name: Sugar Hut Restaurant
restaurants.ambience: An immersive traditional Thai dining experience located within a lush, resort-like forest setting off Thappraya Road. Teak-style salas (dining pavilions) surround a tranquil pool, alongside ambient music and nature sounds—ideal for special occasions
must_try_dishes: Gaeng Gari Gai (Malaysian-style yellow chicken curry)
Bou Loy (rice dumplings in coconut milk)
source_files: Thailand/Arpita Thailand.pdf

restaurants.name: The Glass House Pattaya
restaurants.ambience: Beachfront and chic, ideal for cocktails with a beautiful ocean backdrop
source_files: Thailand/Arpita Thailand.pdf

restaurants.name: Drifters Beach Cafe
restaurants.ambience: A cozy, relaxed beach café just under 2 km from Pattaya Floating Market. Ideal for sunset views and casual dining
source_files: Thailand/Arpita Thailand.pdf

restaurants.name: Radius Restaurant and Cape Dara Resort
restaurants.ambience: A romantic all-day dining spot perched with expansive views over Pattaya Bay. Open-air seating, sea breeze, serene atmosphere
source_files: Thailand/Arpita Thailand.pdf

restaurants.name: Triple B Cafe Organic
restaurants.ambience: Nestled just steps from Pattaya Floating Market, this cafe delights with a charming, nature-inspired theme—think bamboo lanterns, greenery, and an airy, rustic-modern décor. With both indoor (air-conditioned) and outdoor seating, it's a photo-worthy spot with scenic views overlooking the floating market
must_try_dishes: Khao Soi Kai (Northern-style creamy curry noodle soup)
source_files: Thailand/Arpita Thailand.pdf

attractions.name: Big Buddha/Wat Phra Yai
attractions.description: The centerpiece of the temple is a massive, 18-meter (59-foot) tall golden Buddha statue, one of the largest in Thailand. From the temple grounds, you can enjoy stunning panoramic views of Pattaya Bay and the surrounding areas
source_files: Thailand/All Inclusive Guide for Pattaya and Bangkok.pdf

attractions.name: Sanctuary of Truth
attractions.description: A magnificent wooden temple showcasing intricate Thai architectural and sculptural designs. It is one of the largest wooden structures in the world
attractions.entry_fee: 500 Baht per adult for the day tour
source_files: Thailand/All Inclusive Guide for Pattaya and Bangkok.pdf

attractions.name: Tiffany's Show
attractions.description: Tiffany's Show Pattaya is a world-famous transgender cabaret featuring dazzling costumes, vibrant dance performances, and stunning stage sets. Running since 1974, it offers a glamorous 75-minute spectacle that's colorful, energetic, and family-friendly
attractions.entry_fee: Starting from ฿1000 for mezzanine seats and going up to ฿3800 for VIP Diamond seats
